cooperates.cooperate_desc: Ruby works well with heroes that deal area damage. Her crowd control can group enemies together, making it easier for allies to land powerful skills and deal massive damage in team fights.
Ruby holds enemies in place, making it easy for Pharsa to land her skills. This combo is very effective for long range damage and team fight control.
Ruby groups enemies together, making it easy for Vale to hit multiple targets with his skills. Very strong burst combination.

Tigreal and Ruby create a strong crowd control combo. Tigreal can gather enemies with his ultimate, and Ruby can follow up with her skills to keep them locked. This combination is very effective in team fights and can easily control multiple targets.

counters.counter_desc: Karrie deals true damage based on max HP, which makes Ruby sustain less effective. She can melt Ruby quickly even in tank builds.
Valir can push Ruby away and keep distance. His control and damage prevent Ruby from engaging and using her combo.
Diggie ultimate removes crowd control, which completely weakens Ruby impact in fights. Without control, Ruby loses her main strength.
Baxia reduces healing effects. Ruby depends on sustain, so anti heal makes her much easier to kill.

dominants.dominant_desc: Focus on safe farming and short trades. Use skills to poke and sustain with spell vamp. Avoid overextending before level 4. Control the lane and wait for opportunities to engage with your team or punish enemy mistakes.

Start joining team fights and skirmishes. Use your skills to control multiple enemies and create openings. Look for good positioning and engage with your ultimate. Protect allies and disrupt enemy backline.

Stay with your team and focus on controlling fights. One good ultimate can decide the game. Target grouped enemies and use Flicker for better positioning. Maintain sustain and avoid getting caught alone.

emblems.emblem_desc: This emblem set focuses on sustain and durability. Festival of Blood and Brave Smite provide strong healing, allowing Ruby to survive longer in fights. Thrill increases damage for better pressure in lane and team fights. This setup makes Ruby strong in extended fights and consistent in controlling enemies.
This setup focuses on durability and sustain. Extra defense and healing allow Ruby to stay longer in fights and control enemies safely. It is effective against strong burst and heavy damage teams.
This setup improves mobility and cooldown efficiency. Ruby can use skills more often and reposition easily. It increases control potential and helps maintain constant pressure in fights.
This setup increases damage output while keeping some sustain. Ruby becomes more dangerous in fights and can punish enemies faster. Suitable for aggressive players and ***********.

equips.equip_desc: This build focuses on sustain, cooldown reduction and durability. War Axe and Hunter Strike provide damage and mobility. Oracle increases healing from spell vamp and Brave Smite. Dominance Ice reduces enemy healing and attack speed. Immortality gives a second chance in fights. This setup allows Ruby to control enemies and survive in long team fights.
High sustain build with strong healing. Ruby becomes hard to kill and performs well in long fights.
Defensive setup focused on durability. Ruby can absorb damage and control enemies safely in team fights.
Damage focused build. Ruby deals higher damage while keeping sustain, allowing aggressive playstyle.

hero.hero_overview: Ruby is a fighter focused on crowd control, sustain, and front-line disruption. She excels at locking enemies in place, pulling them out of position, and creating openings for her team. Ruby is most effective in EXP Lane or as a utility frontliner, where she can survive long fights and repeatedly pressure enemies with her control skills. Her gameplay revolves around timing, positioning, and chaining skills to keep opponents from escaping.
hero.hero_strength: Ruby has strong crowd control, high sustain and great impact in team fights. She can initiate, protect allies and control multiple enemies at once. Her skill set allows her to survive longer and maintain constant pressure.
hero.hero_weakness: Ruby struggles against high mobility heroes and ranged damage dealers. She depends on proper timing and positioning to be effective. Missing key skills can leave her vulnerable. Anti heal effects and burst damage reduce her sustain and make her easier to kill.

data.recommend: This guide is recommended for players who want a balanced Ruby playstyle with strong sustain and crowd control. It is easy to use and effective in most situations, especially in team fights.

spell.spell_desc: Flicker allows Ruby to quickly reposition in fights. It can be used to engage, escape or surprise enemies. Combined with her ultimate, it helps catch multiple targets and create strong team fight opportunities.

hero.hero_overview:
> Ultimate Ruby Carry Guide 

This guide will help you carry every match with ruby.
The main strategy for this guide is playing SAFE, while helping your jungle whenever you can.

During the first 10 minutes of the game, you should focus on farming while helping your team whenever you can ( Turtle fights and mid gank )

During pre-late game and late game - Focus on targeting their jungler, mage or marksman. You can also set whenever possible as this build also have cooldown.
hero.hero_strength: Ruby shine the most when the enemy doesn't have that much burst and crowd control. However that would likely not happen that much, that is why playing safe and counter engaging the enemy is ruby's biggest strength for this guide.
hero.hero_weakness: As mentioned previously ruby is weak against high burst and high cc enemy heroes. Make sure you don't charge in recklessly and keep calm and only target the enemy's carry.

hero.hero_overview:
Ruby is one of the best hero for goldlane in current meta, her passive gives her free hybrid defense & mobility, enabling her to sustain more during laning phase.

Utilise her first skill to last hit minions within safe range, play safe before War Axe is purchased.
hero.hero_strength:

- Low skills cooldown
- high cc
- her ult + flicker combo is very good at targeting backlines
hero.hero_weakness:
Her primary weakness is playing against heroes with high cc, such as valir, fred, phoveus etc. which can prevent her from maximising her skill casting frequency.

She is also weak against hit & run - heroes, such as irithel, granger, lylia

equips.equip_desc:

hero.hero_overview: Ruby is a character who dominates the map and melee enemies
hero.hero_strength: Early game lane should be played from the tower. The first item you buy depends on the enemy's damage output: if the enemy deals magic damage, you buy a robe; if they deal physical damage, you buy a Dreadnaught armor. Starting at the 4th minute, focus on moving around the map to help your allies. By the mid-game, you should already have the War Axe and Queen's Wings. In the late game, the focus will be on crowd control, and if your enemies have characters like Lancelot, Hayabusa, or Fanny, keep two skills for crowd control.
hero.hero_weakness: Ruby's main weakness is control and suppression. If you're overwhelmed by enemies early on, the game shifts to farming and should be played from the tower. Be wary of Franco and characters with burst damage and strong control.

hero.hero_overview: This guide will explain strategy,equipments,emblems and counters to dominate EXP lane as Ruby.
hero.hero_strength: Ruby is a high sustainability Champ, take advantage of her skills to out heal your enemy during Laning phase to snowball them. with a strong characteristics to take hits, Ruby is a great initiator with her strong crowd controls. try and use her ability to the best of your ability to stay alive with her outstanding heals. focus on her ability to clear the waves faster than your opponent. higher level than your opponent will make you able to win your fight easier.
hero.hero_weakness: Ruby is weak when it comes to fighting champions with strong burst or one that can out heal her. try and not solo fight an opponent without minions nearby. you need to hit multiple target to use your spell vamp heal to the fullest.

data.recommend: this is a good read for beginner Ruby players trying to understand her.

spell.spell_desc: while using Ruby flicker is the most optimal Battle Spell as it allows easy escape and it's also good to pull your enemy using ult into your turret for easy kill.

data.title: Comprehensive Guide to master Ruby in EXP lane.

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Ruby is strong against melee heroes who rely on close combat, like Alucard, Chou, and Lancelot, because she can use her crowd control and lifesteal to outlast them. She works well with heroes who can follow up her Ultimate, such as Eudora or Pharsa.

counters.counter_desc: Ruby is weak against heroes with strong burst or anti-heal effects, like Valir, Lunox, and Esmeralda. Always be careful of enemies who can cancel your combo or keep you at a distance.
Ruby is weak against heroes with strong burst or anti-heal effects, like Valir, Lunox, and Esmeralda. Always be careful of enemies who can cancel your combo or keep you at a distance

dominants.dominant_desc: In the early game, focus on farming safely in the EXP lane and use Skill 1 to poke enemies while healing with lifesteal. After reaching level 4, look for opportunities to help mid or join team fights with your Ultimate. In mid and late game, always stay near your allies and use your skills to control enemies. Try to chain your Skill 2 and Ultimate for strong crowd control, and use Flicker + Ultimate for surprise engages. Avoid overextending alone, and remember that positioning is the key to survive and win fights.

emblems.emblem_desc: The Fighter Emblem gives Ruby extra lifesteal, damage, and durability. With talents like Festival of Blood and Brave Smite, she can heal quickly during fights and stay alive while dealing consistent damage.

equips.equip_desc: This build will give you a good sustainability in long fights

hero.hero_overview:
🩸 Ruby Hero Overview

Role: Fighter / Crowd Control
Specialty: Lifesteal & Chain Control
Lane: EXP Lane or Roam
Difficulty: Moderate
Main Strengths: Excellent sustain, crowd control, and kiting ability.

Ruby is one of the most underrated sustain fighters in MLBB. She excels in chain CC, life-stealing durability, and disrupting team fights.
hero.hero_strength: Ruby excels in sustain and crowd control, allowing her to lock down enemies and survive long fights. Her lifesteal and dashes make her hard to kill and great at countering melee heroes.
hero.hero_weakness: Ruby relies heavily on her skills for damage and sustain, making her weak when crowd controlled or silenced. She has low burst damage, so she struggles against high-mobility or ranged heroes who can kite her from a distance. Anti-heal items like Sea Halberd, Necklace of Durance, or Dominance Ice can drastically reduce her survivability. Additionally, she needs proper timing and positioning to land her combos effectively—missing her ultimate or Skill 2 can leave her vulnerable during fights.

data.recommend: Build the ultimate Ruby! Sustain, CC, and surprise engages. Learn the best build, emblem, and combos to master Ruby in 2025.

spell.spell_desc: Flicker is the best spell for Ruby because it allows her to perform surprise engages or escape dangerous situations. You can combine Flicker with her Ultimate to pull enemies unexpectedly and start a strong team fight.

data.title: Walking Base

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Luo Yi's high AOE burst and early game support can help ruby solve problem without war axe. In late game, both can match by continuous cc and high burst damage.

counters.counter_desc: Sun's clone help ruby gain more target for regeneration. In exp laning, ruby can show an ultimate dominance against Sun.
Dyrroth high burst and physical penetration dangered Ruby's survivability by outpace Ruby's regeneration. It is best to avoid direct confrontation even if antique cuirass or dominance ice is built.
Alpha as jungle would be a problem for Ruby to approach with as Alpha hold slow and huge true damage. In the case of 1v1, Alpha even out speed Ruby in terms of regeneration.

dominants.dominant_desc: Ruby mid game demonstrated dominance in sustainability as antiheal may not be prepared against her. Try to avoid enemy with antiheal and search for minions for large scale regeneration during the fight.

emblems.emblem_desc: High spell vamp ensure regen and sustainability, allowing Ruby to constantly create disruption among enemy team. Little penetration allowed Ruby to gain advantage in fighting 1v1.

equips.equip_desc:
Priority on war axe first. Endless battle could be switch with hunter strike if in need of movement speed. Flexible to change in last two equipment with any tank item if few insufficient in sustainability.
This equipment build allow sustain damage and survival.

Either war axe or dominance in priority in the case of playing roam. Antique cuirass priority could be switch between the last three equipment and could be changed with thunder belt for sustainable slow and disruption.

hero.hero_overview: Ruby main advantage relies upon her sustainability and controlling, thus she could be a tanker, supporter or damage dealer depends on one's playstyle.
hero.hero_strength: Ruby demonstrate laning advantage due to her 1st skill long distance and regeneration. This ensure her sustainability in continuous fight. Her short cd cc could also help create disruption among enemy and initiate team fight.
hero.hero_weakness: Ruby may not be a best choice in handling high burst or high cc enemy. She is also less useful in early and late game.

spell.spell_desc: Ruby's most effective battle spell is Flicker, which allows her to create a "flicker hook" with her ultimate. This technique involves ulting the enemy and then using Flicker to reposition, pulling them towards your team or a tower. Vengeance is another recommended battle spell for Ruby, as it can improve her sustainability and damage output.

data.title: ruby best tank guide

cooperates.cooperate_desc:
Thanks to Floryn's ultimate makes Ruby to have more spellvamp and healing recieved for 2 sec to counter enemies with their anit lifesteal equipments or spells.

Combo it with Orcale will make Ruby unkillable.
Both heroes have excellent CC they can group enemies all at once and burst them down making them a nightmare wombo combo.

counters.counter_desc:
Ruby is very weak against Hilda from early to mid game since Hilda can reduce Ruby's defenses and can one shot Ruby with her ultimate with maxed stacks.(Hildas passive reduces creates stacks on her enemies by reducing their defenses) 
Therefore ypu need play passive and get your core items then you will get your momentum to counter Hilda.

Khufra make Ruby's passive useless making her unable to dash out to stack up her passive or to dash out to escape or chase down her enemies.
Khufra have heavy cc too making it for Ruby hard to survive during teamfights by having countless blockade and stuns.

dominants.dominant_desc:
Focus on getting last hits on minions so that you can get your core items.

Play passive if you are playing against your counter part.
If you can zone out your enemies you can.

Focus on helping allies such as the jungler with the turtle or lord,if not avoid joining to prevent from dying or feeding the enemies.

Try to split push as possible and try give vision or zoning out your enemies so that the other teams can focus on getting the turtle or lord.

Don't go for kills,go for assists your teammates because you will get the true MVP with the most assists.

emblems.emblem_desc: Using these emblem setup will benefit your Ruby in your laning stage early game till late. You need to focus on last hitting the minions for faster gold and use enemies minions to gain life back when low on health. When going against your counterpart always consider play passive diring early and mid stage,till u get your two core items before you can floor your enemies and assists your allies in team fights. Having these emblem setup also helps with tankiness in your laning phase.

equips.equip_desc:
Building more spellvamp items such as War axe,Endless battle and Queens wings will increase Ruby's spellvamp % to sustain more in teamfights and can benefit to survive longer in teamfights thanks to Queens wings and rose gold meteor.

Rose gold metoer can benefit Ruby by increasing her hybrid defenses which will combine well with her stacked passive.

Oracle is beneficial item for Ruby to counter enemies anti-lifesteal equipments or spells.

You can replace Ruby's boots with Immortality to have more survivability, yes it will reduce Ruby's movement and CC reduction,but late game Ruby can spam her skills to move faster because her spells uses less mana. Or you can swap the boots for Bruteforce breastsplate to have more CC reduction and movement speed with its passive.

hero.hero_overview:
Ruby is absolutely great fighter in exp lane she is such a nightmare with her CC and her spellvamps and stacked passive makes her unkillable in 1v1 or in teamfights.

Spamming her skills and passive increases her hybrid defenses to last longer in teamfights.

Her favorite time of the game is by dancing and hunting her preys!!!
hero.hero_strength:
- High spellvamp ratio %
- Excellent CC(crowd controls)
- Have small dash (can dash through thin walls to escape or chase enemies)
- Good hybrid defense
- Good burst damage
hero.hero_weakness:
- Anti lifesteal equipment or spells.
- Heavy CC and CC immunity (crowd controls)(Purify, Atlas, Khufra, Diggie etc.)
- Heavy hybrid reduction from items or spells from enemy hero(Hilda, Dyroth etc.)
- Reliable on support heroes to survive longer in teamfights(Floryn, Angela etc.)

data.recommend: This is my Rubae guide for Pure spellvamp and Assists King MVP for my Ruby and it will make you Assists King too with Ruby :) <3 <3 <3...

spell.spell_desc:
Flicker spell is always the best option to flick in or flick out in teamfights.

Using this spell can bait your enemies to pull them into your tower for kills or to ult flicker to chase down the low point enemies but don't be greedy :).
